title: 怎麼看巴基斯坦前總理 Imran Khan 剛剛被槍擊?
meta_description: 怎麼看巴基斯坦前總理 Imran Khan 剛剛被槍擊? - Imran Khan  https://edition.cnn.com/2022/11/03/asia/imran-khan-pakistan-rally-intl/index.html   Islamabad, Pakistan CNN —  Pakis...

contents:
Imran Khan

https://edition.cnn.com/2022/11/03/asia/imran-khan-pakistan-rally-intl/index.html


Islamabad, Pakistan
CNN
—
Pakistan’s ex-Prime Minister Imran Khan was injured Thursday after an unidentified gunman opened fire at a rally, according to an official from Khan’s Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) party.

A bullet hit Khan in his foot, PTI senior leader Asad Umar said.

The former Pakistan cricket captain was taken from the rally site just outside the town of Gujranwallah to receive treatment in Lahore. At least three other people were injured by gunfire. The extent of the other injuries is not yet known.

On October 21, the Election Commission of Pakistan (ECP) recommended that Khan be disqualified from holding political office for five years, a move likely to further inflame political tensions in the country.

While reading out the recommendation, ECP chief Sikandar Sultan Raja stated that Khan was disqualified for being involved in “corrupt practices.”

The commission said its decision was based on the grounds that Khan had “made false statements” regarding the declaration of the sale of gifts sent to him by the leaders of Saudi Arabia and Dubai while in office – an offense that is illegal under the country’s constitution.

據汗所在的巴基斯坦正義運動黨（PTI）的一名官員稱，巴基斯坦前總理伊姆蘭汗週四在一次集會中被一名身份不明的槍手開槍打傷。

PTI高級領導人阿薩德奧馬爾說，一顆子彈擊中了汗的腳。

這位前巴基斯坦板球隊長被從古吉蘭瓦拉鎮外的集會地點帶走，在拉合爾接受治療。至少另外三人被槍擊受傷。其他傷害的程度尚不清楚。

10 月 21 日，巴基斯坦選舉委員會 (ECP) 建議取消可汗擔任政治職務五年的資格，此舉可能會進一步加劇該國的政治緊張局勢。

在宣讀該建議時，ECP 主席 Sikandar Sultan Raja 表示，汗因參與“腐敗行為”而被取消資格。

該委員會表示，其決定是基於可汗在宣佈出售沙特阿拉伯和迪拜領導人在任期間送給他的禮物時“做出虛假陳述”——根據該國憲法，這是非法的罪行.
